mnemonics: TREND IT: Time Series, Regression, Exponential smoothing, Naive methods, Decomposition, Index numbers, Trend models
keyPoints: Time series analysis involves data collected over time to identify patterns, trends, and seasonal variations.
Key components include trend, seasonality, cyclical patterns, and irregular components.
Common methods include moving averages, exponential smoothing, and decomposition.
commonMistakes: Confusing seasonality with cyclical patterns: seasonality is fixed and periodic, while cyclical patterns are longer-term and not fixed.
Overlooking the importance of stationarity in time series models.
Misapplying exponential smoothing parameters without proper validation.
